query:
CREATE TABLE `api_keys` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`name` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
	`keyHash` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
	`keyPrefix` varchar(16) NOT NULL,
	`active` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `api_keys_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `api_keys_keyHash_unique` UNIQUE(`keyHash`)
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2mpomgAgbWqh3Yq.root --database 8K5N6vK7y7HYCxoBr9Ybaa --execute CREATE TABLE `api_keys` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`name` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
	`keyHash` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
	`keyPrefix` varchar(16) NOT NULL,
	`active` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `api_keys_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `api_keys_keyHash_unique` UNIQUE(`keyHash`)
)
